targets.query: from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_pipeline" and r.layer == "L1" and r._field == "ingest_rate")

panels.title: L2 — Enrich latency (ms) · IoC match rate (%)

targets.query: from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_pipeline" and r.layer == "L2" and r._field == "enrich_latency_ms")
from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_pipeline" and r.layer == "L2" and r._field == "ioc_match_rate")
from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_alert" and r._field == "risk_score")
from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_alert" and r._field == "mttd_s")
from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_alert" and r._field == "response_ms") |> mean()
from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_alert" and r._field == "faithfulness_score") |> mean()
from(bucket: "soc_metrics") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "soc_alert" and r._field == "risk_score") |> group(columns: ["priority"]) |> count()
